name: Ct_Record
description: Ct_Record schema from Censys Platform API

added_to_ct_at.description: An RFC-3339-formatted timestamp indicating when the certificate was entered into the CT log.

ct_to_censys_at.description: An RFC-3339-formated timestamp indicating when the certificate was ingested from the CT log into the Censys dataset.

index.description: Numerical marker of the certificate's place in the CT log.
